_comment: SCP MCP Bridge — connects T3MP3ST BLU3H4T to the Python SCP pipeline. Adjust 'command' and 'args' paths to your local deployment.

scp-pipeline.description: Secure-Contain-Protect content gate — inspects, sanitizes, contains, and quarantines untrusted content before it enters LLM context, evidence vault, or state.

provenance.description: Document and IOC provenance tracking — records source, hash, and trust level for all external content.
